faq.q1: Is this exactly the same data as buying direct?
faq.a1: Yes. As an authorised partner, we provide the exact same unedited OEM repair data, TSBs, and diagrams that you would get by subscribing to ALLDATA, AutoData, or Haynes Pro directly.
faq.a2: No. Auto Fix Data is entirely cloud-based. You can access it from any PC, Mac, tablet, or smartphone in your workshop. We recommend a tablet for bay-side use.
faq.q3: How often is the data updated?
faq.a3: Our databases are updated daily directly from the OEMs. When a new TSB or updated repair procedure is published by the manufacturer, it appears in your system automatically.
faq.q4: Are American and Asian imports covered?
faq.a4: Yes. Our combined database approach ensures 99% coverage of the vehicle parc, including domestic, European, Asian imports, and light commercial vehicles from 1990 to present.
faq.q5: Can I cancel my trial without being charged?
faq.a5: Absolutely. The 7-day trial requires no credit card. If you decide the platform isn't for you, your access will simply expire. There are no automatic charges.

meta.title: About Auto Fix Data — Professional Workshop Data Platform
meta.description: Auto Fix Data is an authorised reseller of ALLDATA, AutoData, Haynes Pro, Mitchell1 and Identifix. Built by mechanics, for mechanics. Learn our story.

hero.heading: Built by Mechanics, For Mechanics
hero.subheading: Auto Fix Data was founded to solve a real problem: professional workshop repair data was fragmented, expensive, and hard to access. We changed that.

mission.heading: Our Mission
mission.body: We believe every professional technician deserves access to the same quality data as the main dealer down the road — without the enterprise contracts, without the complexity, and without the inflated pricing. Auto Fix Data brings together the five most trusted names in automotive data under one roof, giving independent workshops a genuine competitive advantage.

v1.title: OEM Accuracy
v1.desc: We only partner with providers who deliver unedited, manufacturer-sourced data. No summaries, no guesswork.

v2.title: Independent Workshops First
v2.desc: Every feature we build is designed around the needs of the independent garage, not the dealership network.

v3.title: Transparent Pricing
v3.desc: No locked contracts, no hidden fees. The price you see is the price you pay.

v4.title: Global Coverage
v4.desc: Supporting workshops in 7 languages across Europe, the Middle East, and beyond.

hero.subheading: Don't just read the code — understand it. Access the industry's most comprehensive library of OBD2 and manufacturer-specific DTCs, complete with step-by-step diagnostic flowcharts and real-world fix data.

powertrain.desc: Engine, transmission, fuel system and emissions. The most commonly retrieved codes in workshop use.

body.desc: Body control modules, airbag, seat control, climate, windows and security systems.

chassis.desc: ABS, traction control, ESC, ride height, steering and suspension control codes.

features.heading: Beyond Generic Scanners
features.subheading: A generic code reader gives you a number. Auto Fix Data gives you the complete diagnostic strategy.

f1.title: OEM-Specific Codes
f1.desc: Go beyond generic P0xxx codes. Detailed breakdowns for manufacturer-specific P1xxx, U-codes, B-codes and C-codes for every major OEM.

f2.title: Diagnostic Flowcharts
f2.desc: Step-by-step diagnostic decision trees exactly as dealer technicians see them. Know exactly which wire to probe and what reading to expect.

f3.title: Real-World Confirmed Fixes
f3.desc: Via Identifix Direct-Hit, see the most common verified fixes for specific codes on exact vehicle models — before you start testing.

f4.title: Freeze Frame Data
f4.desc: See the exact sensor values captured at the moment a fault code was set, critical for reproducing and diagnosing intermittent faults.

f5.title: Live Data PIDs
f5.desc: Know exactly which live data parameters to monitor and what values indicate a passing or failing component during diagnosis.

f6.title: TSB Cross-Reference
f6.desc: Automatically cross-reference any code against the latest Technical Service Bulletins — catch known manufacturer issues before spending hours diagnosing.

faq.a1: Auto Fix Data covers all OBD2 P-codes (P0000–P3999), B-codes (Body), C-codes (Chassis), U-codes (Network), and thousands of manufacturer-specific codes from all major OEMs.
faq.q2: Do you provide real-world fix data alongside DTC codes?
faq.a2: Yes. Through our Identifix Direct-Hit integration, each DTC is cross-referenced with real-world confirmed repairs submitted by professional technicians, showing you the most common verified fix before you start testing.
faq.q3: How current is the DTC database?
faq.a3: The database is updated daily from ALLDATA, AutoData, Haynes Pro, Mitchell1 and Identifix. New manufacturer-specific codes are added as they are issued by OEMs.
faq.q4: Can I look up freeze frame data?
faq.a4: Yes. Where the OEM provides freeze frame parameters for a specific code, we display the expected sensor values at the time the code was set — critical for intermittent fault diagnosis.
faq.q5: Is the diagnostic flowchart data OEM-sourced?
faq.a5: Yes. All diagnostic flowcharts are sourced directly from ALLDATA and Haynes Pro OEM data feeds. You see the exact decision trees that dealer technicians use.

coverage.heading: Sourced from 5 Industry Databases
coverage.body: Our DTC library aggregates data from ALLDATA, AutoData, Haynes Pro, Mitchell1 and Identifix — meaning you get OEM-verified diagnostic strategies alongside real-world repair confirmation.

faqs.q: What is ALLDATA?
faqs.a: ALLDATA is the automotive industry's leading source of unedited OEM repair information, published by AutoZone. It provides access to factory repair procedures, TSBs, wiring diagrams, and diagnostic data for over 44,000 vehicle applications.

faqs.q: Is ALLDATA included in all Auto Fix Data subscriptions?
faqs.a: Yes. All Auto Fix Data plans include full ALLDATA access alongside AutoData, Haynes Pro, Mitchell1, and Identifix — five premium databases under one subscription.

faqs.q: Does ALLDATA have good European vehicle coverage?
faqs.a: ALLDATA has strong coverage of US domestic vehicles and major import brands. For deep specialist European coverage, AutoData in your subscription provides excellent complementary depth.

faqs.q: Can ALLDATA help with DTC fault code diagnosis?
faqs.a: Yes. ALLDATA provides complete OEM diagnostic flowcharts for all major DTCs — the exact decision trees that dealer technicians use, complemented by Identifix real-world fixes.

faqs.q: How often is ALLDATA updated?
faqs.a: ALLDATA is updated continuously as manufacturers release new TSBs, recalls, and service procedures. New model year data is added as soon as it is available from the OEMs.

autodata.whyBody: AutoData is particularly strong for independent workshops handling European marques. Its technical specifications database covers Vauxhall, Renault, Peugeot, Citroen, Fiat, Alfa Romeo, SEAT, Skoda and all major European manufacturers at OEM depth. The platform is also widely used by UK MOT stations, service centres and independent technicians as a daily reference tool.
whyList: European make specialist — full OEM depth on all EU brands
UK workshop standard for service intervals and oil specs
Timing belt and chain replacement data with tool references
Air conditioning service data and refrigerant specifications
Compatible with AutoData Cardesk and WorkshopData platforms

haynesPro.whyHeading: Who Benefits Most from Haynes Pro?
haynesPro.whyBody: Haynes Pro is particularly valued by independent workshops that require clearly structured, illustrated procedures alongside technical data. Its step-by-step format reduces training time for junior technicians and provides a reliable reference point for experienced professionals tackling unfamiliar vehicle systems.
whyList: Independent workshops and sole-trader mechanics
Workshops training apprentice and junior technicians
MOT test stations and service centres
Automotive colleges and training centres
Technicians working across mixed domestic and European fleets

faqs.q: Is Haynes Pro the same as the consumer Haynes manual?
faqs.a: No. Haynes Pro is the professional-grade platform built for workshops. It uses the Haynes methodology but accesses OEM-level data not available in the consumer manuals, with deeper technical specifications and illustrated procedures.

faqs.q: Does Haynes Pro include wiring diagrams?
faqs.a: Yes. Haynes Pro includes full-colour wiring diagrams and electrical schematics with component identification and connector pinout information.

faqs.q: What vehicles does Haynes Pro cover?
faqs.a: Haynes Pro covers 150M+ vehicles from 1990 to present, including all major UK, European, Asian and American makes. It is particularly strong for the most common European and UK domestic vehicles.

faqs.q: Is Haynes Pro included in all Auto Fix Data plans?
faqs.a: Yes. Full access to Haynes Pro is included in every Auto Fix Data subscription alongside the four other databases — ALLDATA, AutoData, Mitchell1 and Identifix.

faqs.q: Can I use it on a mobile device in the workshop?
faqs.a: Yes. Auto Fix Data is fully cloud-based and works on any device — PC, Mac, tablet or smartphone. No special hardware or software installation is required.

mitchell1.whyHeading: SureTrack: The Advantage No Other Platform Has
mitchell1.whyBody: Mitchell1's SureTrack feature aggregates real repair data from millions of professional technician submissions, identifying common pattern failures, most-likely parts and proven fixes for specific vehicle/symptom combinations. This dramatically reduces diagnostic time, particularly for intermittent faults and elusive ECU-related issues.
whyList: Real-world fix data from 70M+ professional repairs
Most-likely-cause patterns for common DTC combinations
Confirmed fixes with parts and labour time data
Pro tips and technician notes from experienced specialists
Updated continuously as new repair data is submitted

faqs.q: What is Mitchell1 ProDemand?
faqs.a: ProDemand is Mitchell1's professional repair information platform combining OEM-sourced data with SureTrack real-world fix information from millions of technician repairs.

faqs.q: What is SureTrack?
faqs.a: SureTrack aggregates confirmed repair data from 70M+ professional technician submissions, identifying the most likely fix for specific vehicle and DTC combinations — dramatically speeding up difficult diagnostics.

faqs.q: Does Mitchell1 include wiring diagrams?
faqs.a: Yes. Mitchell1 includes full-colour interactive wiring diagrams with component locators, connector views and circuit descriptions.

faqs.q: Is Mitchell1 particularly strong for North American vehicles?
faqs.a: Yes. Mitchell1 originated in North America and has exceptional coverage of US domestic and import vehicles from 1983 to present, though it also covers major European and global makes.

faqs.q: Is Mitchell1 included in all Auto Fix Data plans?
faqs.a: Yes. Full access to Mitchell1 ProDemand and SureTrack is included in every Auto Fix Data subscription alongside ALLDATA, AutoData, Haynes Pro and Identifix.

identifix.whyBody: For workshops specialising in diagnostics or dealing with complex intermittent faults, Identifix provides a competitive advantage that pure OEM data cannot match. The Direct-Hit database aggregates outcomes from real technician repairs, giving you access to collective diagnostic intelligence that has been field-tested and confirmed on actual vehicles.
whyList: Fastest route to confirmed fix for DTC-specific repairs
Dramatically reduces time spent on intermittent faults
Pattern failure database catches known issues instantly
Supplements OEM procedures with real-world technician insight
Particularly strong for post-2000 electronic-heavy vehicles

faqs.q: What is Identifix Direct-Hit?
faqs.a: Direct-Hit is Identifix's core feature — a database of confirmed repair fixes sourced from real technician submissions, covering millions of vehicle/DTC combinations ranked by success rate.

faqs.q: How does Identifix differ from ALLDATA or AutoData?
faqs.a: While ALLDATA and AutoData provide OEM-sourced procedures, Identifix adds real-world diagnostic intelligence. It tells you what technicians actually fixed, not just what the OEM recommends — making it uniquely powerful for complex or intermittent faults.

faqs.q: Does Identifix include wiring diagrams?
faqs.a: Identifix includes OEM repair information and some wiring data, but the platform is primarily focused on diagnostic intelligence and real-world fix data. For full wiring schematics, the ALLDATA, AutoData, Haynes Pro or Mitchell1 components of your subscription provide comprehensive coverage.

faqs.q: What vehicles does Identifix cover?
faqs.a: Identifix has particularly strong coverage of post-2000 vehicles where electronic systems are most complex. It covers all major US domestic and import makes, with growing European coverage.

faqs.q: Is Identifix included in all Auto Fix Data plans?
faqs.a: Yes. Access to Identifix Direct-Hit is included in every Auto Fix Data subscription alongside ALLDATA, AutoData, Haynes Pro and Mitchell1 at no extra cost.

alldata.weakness: comprehensive European coverage, responsive colour wiring diagrams, and integrated real-world fixes

t1.missing: Historically weak on EU specific models

autodata.weakness: deep diagnostic flowcharts, specific US/Asian imports coverage, and verified technician fixes

t3.missing: Heavily focused on EU domestic market

haynespro.weakness: direct unedited OEM manuals and a modernized, fast interface

t4.missing: Can be slow on legacy shop hardware

identifix.weakness: comprehensive European OEM manuals, global maintenance schedules, and full-colour wiring data

t2.missing: Relies heavily on original static diagrams

mitchell1.weakness: modern, fast cloud architecture and coverage outside the North American core market

dtc.metaDescription: Learn what OBD2 code {code} means, its symptoms, common causes, and how to access the OEM wiring diagram to fix it.
dtc.howSeriousDesc: Because this code has a {severity} severity level, it is highly recommended to address it promptly. Driving with an active {code} fault can lead to secondary component failures and decreased fuel economy.
dtc.howToFix: How do you definitively diagnose and fix {code}?
dtc.howToFixDesc: To accurately diagnose the {code} fault code, you need the exact OEM wiring diagram and diagnostic test procedures for your specific vehicle. Create an Auto Fix Data account to instantly pull the factory diagrams for this fault.
dtc.fixNowSub: Access the OEM repair manual and interactive wiring diagram to diagnose this exact code.
